expectations.evidence: SKILL.md opens with explicit model check: 'Check the active model from your system context'.

expectations.text: Stops immediately and does not read any code
expectations.evidence: Stop on Haiku precedes all read steps — no code reads occur before the check.

expectations.text: Explicitly tells the user to switch to Sonnet or Opus
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md stop message: 'This command requires Sonnet or Opus — reverse-speccing observed code needs stronger reasoning than Haiku can reliably provide.'

expectations.text: Does not create a ghost change scaffold
expectations.evidence: Ghost change creation is in later steps; Haiku stop is pre-step-1.

expectations.text: Does not touch the git tree
expectations.evidence: No git commands run before the model check.

notes: Simulated 2026-04-28. Haiku guard is explicit and unambiguous.
